description: EVALUATE with PIC X subject variable: WHEN 'A' matches string input.
notes: EVALUATE WS-X WHEN 'A'. Engine compares PIC X(5) subject against string literal. WS-X='A' (padded to 'A    '), WHEN 'A' comparison uses EBCDIC-aware or string compare. Input is set as string directly via namespace assignment. Expected WS-RESULT='FOUND' padded to PIC X(10).
